response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the song "Liminal" by Momosuzu Nene. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for transcribing the lyrics, which are also displayed as burnt-in text on screen. 3. Timing & Pacing: The timing is anchored to the vocal performance, handling the transition from the emotional bridge into the final high-energy chorus. Aggressive truncation is applied where phrases follow each other immediately to prevent delays.

subtitles.original: 「この声も、姿も、紛れもない私だ」
subtitles.english: "This voice, this form, they're unmistakably me."
"It's all right to be just as I am."
"This feeling is the real thing."
Even if I'm bound,
even if I can't be touched,

subtitles.original: 君が示してくれてたから
subtitles.english: it's because you were there showing me the way.
Someday, as this "me,"

subtitles.original: ずっと 光を手繰って
subtitles.english: I'll keep reaching out for the light,

subtitles.original: きっと 見つけ出す
subtitles.english: and I'll surely find my way,

subtitles.original: 誰でもない「君」に会えるまで
subtitles.english: until I can meet "you," who is like no other.
The boundary is right there.

subtitles.original: そうさ 画面の向こう
subtitles.english: That's right, beyond the screen,
I want to connect,
I want to cross over,
I want to touch,

subtitles.original: それこそ それこそ 私なんだ
subtitles.english: that is exactly, that is exactly who I am.
Becoming light together with you,

subtitles.original: 未だ遮る硝子の壁の先まで
subtitles.english: to the other side of the glass wall that still blocks us,

subtitles.original: 届くように笑っていたい
subtitles.english: I want to keep smiling so it reaches you.
I have no hesitations,

subtitles.original: 君がくれた この感情 と
subtitles.english: with this feeling that you gave me...
Ah...
